variables.input:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| fields k8s.namespace.name
| dedup k8s.namespace.name

fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider"
| fields utility
| dedup utility
| sort utility

1.content:
**GenericUtility Platform** — Polyglot microservices (20+ services, 10 languages) running on AKS · ApplicationId: `APPLICATION-9796F941CE3EB608`

**Apps:** Customer Billing (.NET 6) · Outage Analytics (Node.js, Java, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, Kotlin, Rust, .NET)

**Event Providers:** `exelon.event.provider` (metering, billing, grid, outages) · `genericutility.event.provider` (SCADA, weather, reliability, crews)

**Namespaces:** `utility-customer-billing` · `utility-outage-analytics`

3.title: ⚡ Smart Meter Readings
3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "smart.meter.reading"
| summarize totalReadings = count()

4.title: 💰 Billing Events
4.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "customer.billing"
| summarize totalBilling = count(), avgAmount = avg(billing.amount)

5.title: 🔌 Outages Reported
5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "outage.reported"
| summarize outageCount = count(), totalAffected = sum(customers.affected)

6.title: 🔧 Work Orders Completed
6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "work.order.completed"
| summarize orderCount = count(), avgDuration = avg(duration.minutes)

7.title: 📊 Grid Status by Utility — Load % & Frequency
7.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "grid.status"
| summarize avgLoad = avg(load.percent), avgFreq = avg(frequency.hz), avgCapacity = avg(capacity.mw), avgDemand = avg(demand.mw), readings = count(), by:{utility}
| sort avgLoad desc

8.title: 📈 Smart Meter Readings Over Time
8.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "smart.meter.reading"
| makeTimeseries readings = count(), avgKwh = avg(reading.kwh), bins:30

9.title: 💵 Billing by Utility (Revenue Distribution)
9.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "customer.billing"
| summarize totalRevenue = sum(billing.amount), billingCount = count(), avgBill = avg(billing.amount), by:{utility}
| sort totalRevenue desc

10.title: 🔌 Outages by Cause & Customers Affected
10.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "outage.reported"
| summarize outages = count(), customersAffected = sum(customers.affected), by:{outage.cause}
| sort customersAffected desc

11.title: ⚡ Energy Delivered by Source
11.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "energy.delivered"
| summarize totalMwh = sum(energy.mwh), deliveries = count(), by:{energy.source}
| sort totalMwh desc

12.title: 🔧 Work Orders by Type & Priority
12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and event.type == "work.order.completed"
| summarize orders = count(), avgMinutes = avg(duration.minutes), by:{work.type, priority}
| sort orders desc

14.title: 📡 SCADA Telemetry Volume
14.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "scada.telemetry.received"
| summarize scadaCount = count(), totalSensors = sum(sensors), totalAlerts = sum(alerts)

15.title: 🌤️ Weather Observations
15.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "weather.observation.recorded"
| summarize weatherCount = count()

16.title: 📊 Reliability (SAIDI/SAIFI)
16.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "reliability.calculated"
| summarize avgSAIDI = avg(saidi), avgSAIFI = avg(saifi), avgCAIDI = avg(caidi), avgMAIFI = avg(maifi)

17.title: 🔔 Notifications Sent
17.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "notification.sent"
| summarize notifCount = count(), totalSent = sum(total.sent)

18.title: 🌩️ Weather Conditions Distribution
18.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "weather.observation.recorded"
| summarize observations = count(), by:{condition, severity}
| sort observations desc

19.title: 📊 Reliability Indices Trend (SAIDI/SAIFI/CAIDI)
19.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider" and event.type == "reliability.calculated"
| makeTimeseries avgSAIDI = avg(saidi), avgSAIFI = avg(saifi), avgCAIDI = avg(caidi), bins:30

20.title: 🚨 Outage Timeline (Reported vs Resolved)
20.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" and (event.type == "outage.reported" or event.type == "outage.resolved")
| makeTimeseries reported = countIf(event.type == "outage.reported"), resolved = countIf(event.type == "outage.resolved"), bins:30

21.title: 📋 All Utility Business Events
21.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.provider == "exelon.event.provider" or event.provider == "genericutility.event.provider"
| summarize eventCount = count(), by:{event.provider, event.type}
| sort eventCount desc

23.title: ⚡ Total Requests
23.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| summarize totalRequests = count()

24.title: ⏱️ Avg Response Time
24.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize avgResponseTime = avg(duration)

25.title: 🚨 Error Rate (%)
25.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize total = count(), failed = countIf(request.is_failed == true)
| fieldsAdd errorRate = (toDouble(failed) / toDouble(total)) * 100

26.title: 🔄 Active Services
26.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| summarize services = countDistinct(dt.entity.service)

27.title: 📊 Service Throughput & Response Times
27.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| summarize requests = count(), avgDuration = avg(duration), p95Duration = percentile(duration, 95), errors = countIf(otel.status_code == "ERROR"), by:{dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd error_rate = 100.0 * errors / requests
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, entity.name], sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:id, prefix:"svc."
| fields svc.entity.name, requests, avgDuration, p95Duration, error_rate
| sort requests desc
| limit 20

28.title: 📈 Request Throughput Over Time by Namespace
28.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{k8s.namespace.name}, bins:40

29.title: 📉 Response Time Trend (P50/P90/P95)
29.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| makeTimeseries p50 = percentile(duration, 50), p90 = percentile(duration, 90), p95 = percentile(duration, 95), bins:40

30.title: 🔍 Top Operations by Request Count
30.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter span.name != "GET" and span.name != "POST"
| summarize requests = count(), avgDuration = avg(duration), p95Duration = percentile(duration, 95), by:{span.name}
| sort requests desc
| limit 15

31.title: 🔗 Distributed Traces — Slowest Traces
31.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| sort duration desc
| limit 15
| fields trace_id, span.name, duration, dt.entity.service
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, entity.name], sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:id, prefix:"svc."
| fields trace_id, span.name, svc.entity.name, duration

33.title: 💻 CPU Usage by Workload (millicores)

34.title: 🧠 Memory Usage by Workload (bytes)

35.title: 📊 CPU Ranking — Top Workloads

36.title: 📊 Memory Ranking — Top Workloads

37.title: 🔄 Container Restarts

38.title: ☸️ Kubernetes Workloads
38.query:
fetch dt.entity.cloud_application
| filter namespaceName == "utility-outage-analytics" or namespaceName == "utility-customer-billing"
| fields entity.name, namespaceName, id
| sort namespaceName, entity.name

40.title: 📊 Log Volume by Severity
40.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| summarize logCount = count(), by:{loglevel, k8s.namespace.name}
| sort logCount desc

41.title: 📈 Log Trend (Error vs Warn vs Info)
41.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or loglevel == "WARN" or loglevel == "INFO"
| makeTimeseries errors = countIf(loglevel == "ERROR"), warns = countIf(loglevel == "WARN"), infos = countIf(loglevel == "INFO"), bins:40

42.title: 🚨 Recent Error Logs
42.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "utility-outage-analytics" or k8s.namespace.name == "utility-customer-billing"
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or loglevel == "EMERGENCY"
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 20
| fields timestamp, loglevel, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, content

43.title: 🤖 Davis AI — Recent Problems
43.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 15
| fields timestamp, event.name, event.status, event.category, affected_entity_ids

44.title: 📊 Davis Events by Type
44.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_EVENT" or event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| summarize eventCount = count(), by:{event.kind, event.name}
| sort eventCount desc
| limit 15
